'''B'ante Hatcher''' was the leader of the [[Agamar Resistance|Resistance]] on [[Agamar/Legends|Agamar]], a local group opposed to the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] during the early years of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. He attended a secret rally held by [[Mon Mothma/Legends|Mon Mothma]] to encourage the Agamar Resistance to become part of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]].
